info.title: encore.moe API v2
info.description:
# encore.moe API

This is the API documentation for api-v2.encore.moe. The API provides data for Wuthering Waves including characters, weapons, items, echoes, and more.

## Usage
Most endpoints require a `{lang}` parameter (e.g. `en`, `ja`).

## Resources
* [Website](https://encore.moe)
* [GitHub](https://github.com/alt3ri)
